commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=574e8844179f3691ae4b5781366ba0c5bec3ad09)
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates CI from Node 20/22 to 22/24, raises the README requirement to Node.js >=22, and changes the tsup build target from node20 to node22.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintenance PR, not a bug report. The compatibility concern is source-reproducible from the diff changing README, CI, and build target away from Node 20.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer judgment on the Node 20 support policy, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: chore: bump CI/build Node.js targets from 20 to 22/24
target.body:
## Summary

Node.js 20 [reached end-of-life on 2026-04-30](https://github.com/nodejs/Release#release-schedule) — it's no longer receiving security updates. This bumps the CI matrix and build target to the currently-maintained LTS lines:

- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: test matrix `[20, 22]` → `[22, 24]` (Node 22 is in maintenance LTS until 2027-04, Node 24 is active LTS until 2026-10/maintenance until 2028-04)
- `package.json`: `tsup` build target `node20` → `node22`
- `README.md`: "Requirements" now says `Node.js >= 22`

## Test plan — local run output (proof)

Ran the exact CI pipeline (`lint` → `typecheck` → `test` → `build`) locally on **both** matrix versions this PR adds.

### Node v22.22.3

```
$ pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src test
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 9ms on 18 files with 95 rules using 12 threads.

$ pnpm run typecheck
> tsgo -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
(clean exit, no output)

$ pnpm test
1..16
# tests 16
# pass 16
# fail 0
# cancelled 0
# skipped 0
# todo 0
# duration_ms 320.931417

$ pnpm run build
CLI tsup v8.5.1
CLI Target: node22
ESM Build start
ESM dist/cli.js     30.46 KB
ESM dist/cli.js.map 58.58 KB
ESM ⚡️ Build success in 41ms
```

### Node v24.16.0

```
$ pnpm run typecheck
> tsgo -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
(clean exit, no output)

$ pnpm test
ℹ tests 16
ℹ pass 16
ℹ fail 0
ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
ℹ duration_ms 302.872667

$ pnpm run build
CLI tsup v8.5.1
CLI Target: node22
ESM Build start
ESM dist/cli.js     30.46 KB
ESM dist/cli.js.map 58.58 KB
ESM ⚡️ Build success in 34ms
```

(`oxfmt --check .` reports one pre-existing, unrelated formatting issue on a local-only `.claude/settings.local.json` file that isn't tracked by git and won't exist in CI's checkout — `oxlint`, which is what actually lints `src`/`test`, is fully clean on both runtimes.)

## Note on dropping Node 20

Node 20 is past its official EOL date (2026-04-30) per the [Node.js release schedule](https://github.com/nodejs/Release#release-schedule) — it no longer receives security patches upstream, so continuing to advertise/test it as supported would mean shipping against an unmaintained runtime. Happy to keep Node 20 in the matrix a bit longer alongside 22/24 if @steipete prefers a longer deprecation window — just flag it and I'll adjust.
target.author: joevenner
